stemHtml: A dangerous mistake which can be made when checking for in-flight icing would be…

options.a: Informing ATC about the icing conditions mentioning the levels between icing conditions were experienced.
options.b: Descending to a different flight level where icing conditions are not suspected.
options.c: Not noticing hoar frost, as it may not have changed the aerodynamic shape of the wing.
options.d: Ice protection systems are selected ON.
